channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: U1: service disruption
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: service disruption. [On 23.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: service disruption.
[On 23.05.2026]

item.title: 60: delays
item.description: service obstruction in the direction of Westbahnhof S U. expected duration: 17:00. Reason: switch fault in the stop area Penzinger Straße. [On 23.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
service obstruction in the direction of Westbahnhof S U. expected duration: 17:00. Reason: switch fault in the stop area Penzinger Straße.
[On 23.05.2026]

item.title: 44: traffic accident
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 23.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 23.05.2026]

item.title: Wien Hauptbahnhof ↔ Wien Matzleinsdorfer Platz
item.description: Due to persons on the tracks, no journeys are possible between Vienna Hbf (U) and Wien Matzleinsdorfer Platz Bahnhst until expected 16:00 o'clock. [Since 23.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to persons on the tracks, no journeys are possible between Vienna Hbf (U) and Wien Matzleinsdorfer Platz Bahnhst until expected 16:00 o'clock.
[Since 23.05.2026]

item.title: 22A: Traffic disturbance
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic disturbance. [On 23.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic disturbance.
[On 23.05.2026]

item.title: 95A: Traffic disturbance
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: Traffic disturbance in the area. [On 23.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: Traffic disturbance in the area.
[On 23.05.2026]

item.title: 5: service obstruction False Parker
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 23.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 23.05.2026]

item.title: 5A: service obstruction for rescue operation
item.description: service obstruction in both directions. expected duration: 14:00. Reason: rescue operation in the Dammstraße range. [On 23.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
service obstruction in both directions. expected duration: 14:00. Reason: rescue operation in the Dammstraße range.
[On 23.05.2026]

item.title: 29A/29B: rescue operation
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Line 29A: irregular intervals in both directions. [On 23.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Line 29A: irregular intervals in both directions.
[On 23.05.2026]

item.title: D: rescue operation
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: rescue operation. [On 23.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: rescue operation.
[On 23.05.2026]
